title: Lunacy Shaders
description: See the world through the eyes of a lunatic.
body:
# A shader that takes on the view of a "lunatic" person. 

## **Features**
- All entites are 'quantized' and seem to be at different positions at all time unless they are directly observed, via spyglass or a zoom mod. (Hitboxes ruins this effect)
- Massive chromatic abbaration (I just love applying this everywhere)
- Simple "toon shader" with outlines, and posterization. 
- Maybe more small effects.



This shader is just me trying to add effects that I really like, but couldn't find a good place to add them to. So yes this shader will get more updates to come when I find a good effect that doesn't have a good place to live. Not that anyone will actually use this... Ig this can be a place people come to find cool effects they could add for their own shaders.
